subject: fix(edge-cases): burger menu action throw, cross-tab storage removal
body:
Two edge case fixes found during parallel agent verification:

1. BurgerMenu: if item.action() throws, onClose() was never called,
   leaving the menu stuck open. Now wraps action in try/catch and
   always calls onClose() regardless of success.

2. useDarkMode cross-tab sync: when another tab removes the darkMode
   key from localStorage (e.newValue === null), the handler silently
   ignored it, leaving this tab with a stale preference. Now falls
   back to system preference via matchMedia, matching the hook's
   fresh-load behavior.

Tags: edge-case, dark-mode, burger-menu, resilience
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: glow-props-alignment
Semver: patch
